roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL TO SET APD MTR/DEFT ADV//X:DEFENDANT ADMITS VIOLATING PROBATION AND THE COURT FINDS THAT HE HAS,//X:DEFENDANT PERMANENTLY WAIVES ANY & ALL CTS ACQUIRED PRIOR TO 03-15-01,/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:12 MONTHS/ADDL CTS:30//X:THE 365 DAYS COUNTY JAIL MAY BE SATISFIED BY 365 DAYS IN THE PROGRAM ATSHILOH LIFE CHANGING CENTER AT 5118 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,//X:IF DEFENDANT LEAVES THE PROGRAM OR IS EXPELLED, HE WILL GET NO CTS FOR THE DAYS HE DID DO IN THE PROGRAM AND WILL HAVE TO DO THE 365 DAYS WITH ONLY30 DAYS CTS IN THE COUNTY JAIL,/X:PER ADA MOON, DEFENDANT'S PENDING CASE #1974843 UNDER AKA OF SPRUELL,ROLLO HAS NO RELATIONSHIP TO THIS CASE #1814307,/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE SHERIFF TO RELEASE DEFENDANT TO A REPRESENTATIVEOFTHE SHILOH LIFE CHANGING CENTER,/
